title: Governor of Anhui

**Anhui**, officially the **Governor of the** **Anhui Provincial People's Government**, is the head of [Anhui Province](/wiki/Anhui "Anhui") and leader of the [Anhui Provincial People's Government](/wiki/Anhui_Provincial_People%27s_Government "Anhui Provincial People's Government").

["Decoding Chinese Politics: Provincial Leaders"](https://asiasociety.org/policy-institute/decoding-chinese-politics?policy=provincial-leaders&group=organizations&size=rank&connection=personal). *[Asia Society](/wiki/Asia_Society "Asia Society")*. Retrieved 5 March 2025.

Bartke, Wolfgang (2012) [1997]. "Biographies P-Z". [*Who was Who in the People's Republic of China: With more than 3100 Portraits*](https://books.google.com/books?id=4XshAAAAQBAJ). Vol. 2. Munich: [Walter de Gruyter](/wiki/De_Gruyter "De Gruyter"). The **governor of** **Anhui**, officially the **Governor of the** **Anhui Provincial People's Government**, is the head of [Anhui Province](/wiki/Anhui "Anhui") and leader of the [Anhui Provincial People's Government](/wiki/Anhui_Provincial_People%27s_Government "Anhui Provincial People's Government").

The governor is elected by the Anhui Provincial People's Congress, and responsible to it and its Standing Committee. The governor is a [provincial level official](/wiki/Civil_service_of_the_People%27s_Republic_of_China "Civil service of the People's Republic of China") and is responsible for the overall decision-making of the provincial government. The governor is assisted by an executive vice governor as well as several vice governors. The governor generally serves as the deputy secretary of the [Anhui Provincial Committee of the Chinese Communist Party](/wiki/Anhui_Provincial_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Anhui Provincial Committee of the Chinese Communist Party") and as a member of the [CCP Central Committee](/wiki/Central_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Central Committee of the Chinese Communist Party"). The governor is the second highest-ranking official in the province after the [secretary of the CCP Anhui Committee](/wiki/Party_Secretary_of_Anhui "Party Secretary of Anhui").[[1]](#cite_note-:222-1) The current governor is [Wang Qingxian](/wiki/Wang_Qingxian "Wang Qingxian"), who took office on 1 February 2021.
